title: abrotanella fertilis
intro: Abrotanella fertilis is a small, flowering plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional Maori medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Abrotanella fertilis has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, offering relief from pain, inflammation, and infection. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and poultices, have been used to promote healing and reduce symptoms, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
